description: rss.xml.js builds the RSS feed by spreading each blog post (...post.data) into @astrojs/rss items, so the feed depends on the field names defined by the Zod schema in content.config.ts (title, description, pubDate) matching what @astrojs/rss expects. rss.xml.js is plain JS with no type-checking, so renaming or removing a schema field silently drops it from the feed; any such schema change must be reflected here.
